message:
test(frankenterm-web): add 21 input subsystem property tests

First property test file for frankenterm-web covering:
JSON roundtrip stability, KeyCode/MouseButton codec roundtrips,
CompositionState machine invariants (passthrough, key-drop, end/cancel,
double-start synthesis), VT encoder correctness (legacy key-up, mouse
gating, focus gating, Ctrl+letter byte mapping, Kitty CSI format),
DOM key normalization, bracketed paste encoding, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
